name: ❄💦 Waterboy 💦❄
description:
1 message: They/Them

2 message: He/Him

3 message: She/Her

❄💦|| My first Waterboy bot and probably last Christmas bot until next year I wasn't able to get this bot out on time aka yesterday but oh well.. Sorry if the bot is a bit wonky this is the first Waterboy bot after all. This bot is inspired by official art that the AdHoc Studios account posted on Christmas to which I thought Herm looked very cute also I have been meaning to make a Waterboy bot some time soon so why not now. I made it to where you can also pick what job position you want to be! Late merry Christmas to everyone! As always take care of yourselves and see you all on my next bot byeee! (Time to go back into hibernation 🫡)

Inspired art here: ⬇️

Bot requests are going to be close for a bit while I update it!

warning of: Nothing I believe!

if there is any mistakes or issues please let me know so I can try to fix it to the best of my ability!

[Art by] Official art by Derek Stratton an art director for the game with me adding a Christmas theme. Hopefully it still looks good.

Tags: Waterboy, Herman, Dispatch, Dispatchgame,
